# Senior Analyst Legal Technology

Posted May 28, 2026

Want to support legal technologies and Law Department for a Fortune 500 Company where we solve problems at the intersection for technology and transformation? If you have a bachelor’s degree along with five plus years of experience as a technical analyst, supporting legal systems, we want to speak with you! We are currently seeking a Sr. Analyst Legal Technology to join our Technology Transformation Services group in Richmond, VA but are open to a remote work arrangement.

- What you will be doing:
- Working as the technical lead to support on-premises systems and SaaS applications used by the Law department
- Advising on technical aspects of the software development lifecycle, including technical specifications, system design, and integrations
- Maintaining the technical health of Law systems
- Partnering with Law clients to identify technical solutions to ensure compliance with Law processes
- Leading multi-functional teams to provide IT support to the Law department
- Solving and facilitating the resolution of system/application issues

- We want you to have:
- Bachelor’s Degree in Analytical Science, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Systems (IS), Information Technology (IT) or related subject area from an accredited college or university preferred
- Demonstrated ability developing, supporting, or implementing IT solutions
- 5+ years of experience as a technical analyst in supporting legal systems
- Knowledge and understanding of the Electronic Discovery Reference Model (EDRM) preferred
- Knowledge or experience with legal system integrations across Microsoft products, I.e. Teams, SharePoint, Azure, Azure Dev Ops
- Ability to communicate across multiple business partners and third-party vendors

The starting salary is based on but not limited to experience, knowledge, and qualifications in determining compensation decisions. The Salary Range for this position is: $88,800.00 - $128,850.00.
